projectDescription: An AI-powered clinical research analysis platform that combats p-hacking and unconscious bias by running every valid statistical model specification simultaneously and quantifying how robust a finding truly is.
keyFeatures: Exhaustive multiverse analysis across all valid model specifications
Automated statistical assumption checking (Shapiro-Wilk, Breusch-Pagan, VIF)
Benjamini-Hochberg FDR correction across all specifications simultaneously
AI-powered variable profiling and study intent definition via Claude
Classifier multiverse with Random Forest, Gradient Boosting, XGBoost, and SVM
Automatic covariate role classification using change-in-estimate method
Per-specification DAG visualization and publication-ready plot export
Specification curve showing effect sizes ranked across all models
Modal serverless integration for cloud-scale compute
Streaming AI chat for interactive results interpretation
publicApiSurface: POST /upload — Upload a CSV and receive a session ID with data profile
POST /chat — Chat about data quality and variable definitions
POST /chat-stream — Streaming version of data chat
POST /update-variable — Rename or retype a variable in the session
POST /revert-modification — Undo a specific data modification
POST /intent-chat-stream — Streaming version of intent chat
POST /analyze — Run the full multiverse analysis
POST /results-chat-stream — Streaming AI chat about analysis results
